# Security policy

## Supported versions

Security fixes are applied to the latest code on `main` (the deployed site).

## Reporting a vulnerability

**Do not open a public GitHub issue for security vulnerabilities.**

Please report privately via [GitHub Security Advisories](https://github.com/binarygeek119/CommercialBrainz/security/advisories/new), or email **commercialbrainz@outlook.com** with:

- Description of the issue
- Steps to reproduce / proof of concept
- Impact (auth bypass, data exposure, RCE, etc.)
- Whether you have a suggested fix

We will acknowledge the report and work on a fix. Please give us a reasonable window before public disclosure.

## Scope

In scope examples:

- Authentication / authorization bypass
- Injection or SSRF in the API
- Secrets exposure
- Privilege escalation (user → mod/admin)

Out of scope (use Issues or the site instead):

- Broken YouTube links or metadata quality
- DMCA / copyright claims ([/dmca](https://commercialbrainz.duckdns.org/dmca) or email)
- Feature requests
